permissions.name: GM_info
permissions.discription: An object that exposes information about the current userscript.

permissions.name: GM_getValue
permissions.discription: Retrieves a value for current script from storage.

permissions.name: GM_setValue
permissions.discription: Sets a key / value pair for current script to storage.

permissions.name: GM_deleteValue
permissions.discription: Deletes a key / value pair from storage.

permissions.name: GM_listValues
permissions.discription: Lists all keys of stored key / value pairs.
